headlines.description: — Cade Cunningham had 32 points and 12 assists, Tobias Harris added 30 points and the Detroit Pistons beat the Orlando Magic 116-94 in Game 7 on Sunday to...
headlines.shortLinkText: Cunningham and Harris help Pistons finish comeback for first playoff series win in 18 years

video.headline: Pistons crush Magic in Game 7 to complete 3-1 series comeback

highlights.headline: Pistons crush Magic in Game 7 to complete 3-1 series comeback
highlights.description: The Pistons take down the Magic in dominant fashion in Game 7 to take the series and advance to the Eastern Conference semifinals.

headlines.description: — Jarrett Allen tied his playoff career high with 22 points and grabbed 19 rebounds as the Cleveland Cavaliers advanced to the Eastern Conference semifinals with a 114-102 victory over the Toronto Raptors in Game 7 of their series Sunday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen ties playoff career high with 22 points as Cavaliers beat Raptors 114-102 to advance
